name: Ron-again's Rye Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring all ingredients to room temperature.
2. Pour the ingredients into the bakery machine in the following order: Yeast, Rye flour, Bread flour, Brown sugar, Caraway seeds, Salt, Butter, Warm water.
3. Set the baking control at 10 o'clock.
4. Select "white bread" mode.
5. Press Start.
This recipe yields a very light, fluffy rye bread with a nice, domed top. For best results, ensure the dough is slightly wetter than usual. Just before the bake cycle begins, gently press down on the dough to prevent it from collapsing during baking.
